summary: Create a bg-dark-pattern @utility in colors.css that combines bg-charcoal + background-image texture properties, simplify the .dark-bg rule to use it, remove .dark from the combined background-image rule, and swap before:bg-charcoal to before:bg-dark-pattern in ContentWithMedia TSX+PHP dark mode classes.

fileChanges.description: Create @utility bg-dark-pattern, simplify .dark-bg, remove .dark from background-image rule
fileChanges.details: 1) Remove the combined '.dark, .dark-bg' rule (lines 130-136). 2) Add '@utility bg-dark-pattern' that applies bg-charcoal + background-image: url('../images/dark-bg.png'), background-size: 500px auto, background-position: center, background-repeat: repeat. 3) Add a standalone '.dark-bg' rule that uses @apply bg-dark-pattern. The .dark class itself no longer gets the background-image (it only keeps text-white bg-black from line 125-128). This means only elements explicitly using bg-dark-pattern or .dark-bg get the texture.

fileChanges.description: Replace before:bg-charcoal with before:bg-dark-pattern in dark mode classes
fileChanges.details: In both the content div (line 349) and media div (line 375), change 'before:bg-charcoal' to 'before:bg-dark-pattern' in the dark mode conditional class string. This applies the charcoal background color AND dark texture image to the pseudo-element cards in one utility class.

fileChanges.description: Replace before:bg-charcoal with before:bg-dark-pattern in dark mode classes
fileChanges.details: In both the content div (line 62) and media div (line 95), change 'before:bg-charcoal' to 'before:bg-dark-pattern' in the dark mode conditional class string. Must stay in sync with TSX.

designDecisions.description: Removing .dark from the combined background-image rule means that .dark sections (e.g. the block-level dark wrapper on ContentWithMedia) will NO longer have the texture image by default. Only elements with .dark-bg or the new bg-dark-pattern utility will get the texture. This is intentional per the user's request -- the texture moves to the pseudo-element cards via before:bg-dark-pattern rather than the outer .dark wrapper. Verify that other blocks using .dark still look correct without the background texture on their outer wrappers.

designDecisions.decision: Impact on other blocks using before:bg-charcoal
designDecisions.description: Multiple other blocks (CardsGrid, CardsCarousel, GalleryCarousel, FeaturedPost, TestimonialsCarousel, DynamicContentCarousel, Archive) also use before:bg-charcoal for their dark mode pseudo-elements. This change ONLY modifies ContentWithMedia. If the dark texture should also appear on those blocks' pseudo-elements, separate changes would be needed for each.
